arxiv.title: Are Performance-Optimization Benchmarks Reliably Measuring Coding Agents?

paper.verification: The canonical PDF is a valid 12-page PDF whose metadata title and five-author byline match arXiv. The layout-preserving extraction is non-empty and readable from title, immutable v1 marker, abstract, study design, tables and validity rules through discussion, limitations, and all 53 references. This is acquisition verification, not a deep review.

release.paper_link_audit: The complete immutable arXiv HTML contains no author-owned GitHub, Zenodo, dataset, supplementary-material, or artifact-package link. Its external links are benchmark/reference citations, Google Cloud documentation, and arXiv rendering infrastructure. This records only the paper-linked release check; the reviewer should perform the queue-requested broader author/repository verification before concluding that no release exists.
